option.name: updatedContent
originalContent
option.value:
import { Navbar } from '@/components/layout/navbar' import { Footer } from '@/components/layout/footer' import Link from 'next/link' export default function StudioPage() { return (
DEFRAG workspace

Your relationship-intelligence studio

See how a moment is landing, why it feels so different from your intent, and what to do next. Defrag is a cinematic workspace for relational clarity.

Not a chatbot. A relational intelligence system for moments that can still go either way.

Open Workspace See Plans
{/* Cinematic workspace visual: always visible, less card stacking */}
Workspace Cinematic Visual
) }

option.name: updatedContent
option.value:
import { Navbar } from '@/components/layout/navbar' import { Footer } from '@/components/layout/footer' import Link from 'next/link' import StudioQAClient from './StudioQAClient' export default function StudioPage({ searchParams }: { searchParams?: Record }) { const qaParam = searchParams?.qa const isQA = qaParam === '1' || (Array.isArray(qaParam) && qaParam.includes('1')) // When QA mode is active, render the live workspace inline for testing without redirect if (isQA) { return (
) } return (
DEFRAG workspace

Your relationship-intelligence studio

See how a moment is landing, why it feels so different from your intent, and what to do next. Defrag is a cinematic workspace for relational clarity.

Not a chatbot. A relational intelligence system for moments that can still go either way.

Open Workspace See Plans
{/* Replace placeholder with a working in-page preview of workspace */}
What just happened?
) }
